inputs.label: Weight in Kilograms
inputs.businessContext: The weight of a single item or total weight in kilograms.

inputs.label: Number of Items
inputs.businessContext: Number of items with the given weight.

inputs.label: Packaging Weight
inputs.businessContext: Additional packaging weight per batch in kilograms.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion factor from kilograms to grams (1 kg = 1000 g). Typically 1000, but can be adjusted for specific density/materials.
